convert.title: Convert between formats

convert.heading: Convert
faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
widget.noscript: This compressor runs entirely in your browser and needs JavaScript to access your video file locally. Enable JavaScript to use it — your video still won't be uploaded anywhere.
footer.tagline: Free, private, browser-based video tools — built for people who'd rather not upload their footage to a stranger's server.
footer.bottom: {{SITE_NAME}} runs entirely in your browser — no cookies, no trackers, no accounts.
